title: double-gate rationale undocumented on payment test
description: testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end has both #[ignore] and a TESTNET_ENABLED=1 runtime check. The module doc explains the guard but the function doc-comment does not explain why both are needed. A maintainer who removes the runtime check thinking #[ignore] is sufficient would leave CI unguarded if it runs --ignored globally. The function doc should explain: #[ignore] stops cargo test; TESTNET_ENABLED stops cargo test -- --ignored.
